    net-p2p/readarr: Update to 0.3.8.2267

    ChangeLog: https://github.com/Readarr/Readarr/releases/tag/v0.3.8.2267

     * Multiple Translations updated by Weblate
     * Add PostgreSQL specific query for cleaning multiple monitored editions
     * Fixed: Avoid logging evaluations when not using any Remote Path Mappings
     * Add status test all button for IndexerLongTermStatusCheck
